tagline: New features and improvements for Genie Agents to enhance user experience.
what_it_does: The Genie Agent now supports embedding as an iframe in external applications, allows authors to attach thumbnails for better visual identification, and introduces conditional formatting for table visualizations. Additionally, Agent mode is set as the default conversation setting, and users can request reviews for messages in Agent mode. A bug fix has also been implemented to ensure SQL attachments are correctly displayed.
why_it_matters: These enhancements improve the usability and visual appeal of Genie Agents, making it easier for business users to interact with data. By embedding Genie Agents in external applications, organizations can streamline workflows and increase productivity. The ability to request reviews and improved visualizations also enhances data governance and user engagement.
plain_summary: Genie Agents now have new features like embedding in apps, thumbnails, and better visualizations.

capabilities.title: Embed Genie Agent
capabilities.desc: Genie Agents can now be embedded as iframes in external websites and applications.

capabilities.title: Thumbnails for Spaces
capabilities.desc: Authors can attach thumbnails to Genie Agents for better identification on chat pages.

capabilities.title: Conditional Formatting
capabilities.desc: Table visualizations generated by Genie now support conditional formatting for improved readability.

capabilities.title: Default Agent Mode
capabilities.desc: Agent mode is now the default setting for conversations in Genie Agents.

prerequisites: Unity Catalog must be enabled and data registered.
Users need CAN USE permission on a pro or serverless SQL warehouse.
Users must have Databricks SQL workspace entitlement.
use_cases: Embedding Genie Agents in customer-facing applications.
Using thumbnails to enhance user navigation in data queries.
Generating visually appealing reports with conditional formatting.
limitations: Each Genie Agent can support up to 10,000 conversations.
Each conversation can include up to 10,000 messages.

steps.title: Create Genie Agent
steps.desc: Click 'Genie Agents' in the sidebar and select 'New' to start.

steps.title: Add Data Sources
steps.desc: Choose the data sources to include in your Genie Agent.

steps.title: Configure Settings
steps.desc: Access settings to customize the agent, including adding thumbnails.

steps.title: Enable Agent Mode
steps.desc: Set Agent mode as the default conversation setting.

steps.title: Test and Iterate
steps.desc: Review and refine the Genie Agent based on user feedback.

key_takeaway: The Genie Agent enhancements significantly improve user interaction and data visualization capabilities.
